Hi! You must be Zilaudio. I am Rachel, from Chicago.
Hi Rachel, nice to meet you. I am a farmer and a lawyer.
Two jobs! What do you grow here?
I grow soybeans. It is our main crop. Our fields are near Sorriso.
How big is the farm?
It is two thousand hectares. The harvest starts in January.
And the law? Do you work at a firm?
Yes. I work at a small firm, for local companies.
I'm Zilaudio. Nice to meet you.
I'm a farmer and a lawyer.
I grow soybeans in Mato Grosso.
Our farm is near Sorriso.
I work at a law firm too.

Hi Zilaudio, this is Rachel from Chicago. I am back in the office now, and I wanted to say thank you for the visit last week. Your fields are beautiful, and I was very impressed. I talked to my team about your farm, and they have some questions. Could you send me the size of the farm in hectares, and the dates of the harvest? That would help us a lot. I would like to talk again next week, if you have time. Just call me back when you can. Thank you, and have a good day.

Good morning, and welcome to the International Agriculture Fair. The fair opens at nine o'clock, and the doors close at six. Please show your badge at the door. You cannot enter without it. If you are here to meet buyers, go to hall two. That is where all the international companies are today. Hall one is for machinery, and hall three is for seeds and suppliers. There is a talk about the soybean market at eleven o'clock, in the main room. Coffee is free all day, near the entrance. We hope you have a good day, and good business.
